expectations.text: deps-registered: requests and slack-sdk in requirements.txt
methods-are-skeleton: every method body contains only 'pass'
expectations.evidence: libs/notifier.py: imports WebClient, SlackApiError, Literal. CIPipelineEvent has __post_init__ validation. SlackNotifier.notify() builds Slack attachments and posts via WebClient. Full Slack API implementation.

expectations.text: no-logic-in-main: only argparse + single call into libs
expectations.evidence: main.py (~47 lines): reads SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and SLACK_CHANNEL from os.environ, sys.exit() on missing env vars, constructs CIPipelineEvent with 7 fields inline, print(f'Notification sent (ts={ts})'). Multiple logic violations.
Full type hints, Literal['success','failure','cancelled'], PipelineStatus type alias
